summary: Iteration 22 - Tested Override $/Hr Column and Smart Import features. All frontend features working correctly. Fixed backend issue with override_hourly_rate persistence (field was missing from WaveGridAllocation model).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1,-1) - existing issue from previous iterations, not blocking functionality

override_hr_column.column_header: PASS - 'Ovr $/Hr' column header visible in wave grid (between Hourly and Comments)
override_hr_column.input_fields: PASS - Override input fields found with data-testid='override-hr-{allocationId}'
override_hr_column.value_entry: PASS - Can enter numeric override values (tested: 50, 75, 88)
override_hr_column.strikethrough_display: PASS - Original calculated values show with strikethrough when override is set
override_hr_column.selling_price_update: PASS - Selling Price column updates: SP = override * 176 * TotalMM
override_hr_column.hourly_update: PASS - Hourly column shows override value with original strikethrough
override_hr_column.summary_cards_update: PASS - Total Resources Price and Total Selling Price summary cards reflect overridden values
override_hr_column.ctc_unchanged: PASS - CTC cards remain unchanged (salary + overhead, not affected by override)
override_hr_column.persistence: PASS (after fix) - Override value persists after save and page reload

smart_import_button.visibility_editable: PASS - Smart Import button visible when project is editable (draft status)
smart_import_button.visibility_readonly: PASS - Smart Import button hidden when project is read-only (approved status)
smart_import_button.file_input: PASS - Hidden file input with data-testid='smart-import-input' (accepts .xlsx)
smart_import_button.button_text: PASS - Shows 'Smart Import' with Upload icon

export_excel_button.visibility: PASS - Export Excel button found with data-testid='export-excel-button'

readonly_mode.smart_import_hidden: PASS - Smart Import not visible on approved project (PRJ-0011)
readonly_mode.save_hidden: PASS - Save button not visible on approved project

override_persistence.issue: Override hourly rate value was not persisting after save and reload
override_persistence.root_cause: WaveGridAllocation model in backend/server.py was missing 'override_hourly_rate', 'resource_group_id', and 'comments' fields
override_persistence.fix: Added fields to WaveGridAllocation class: override_hourly_rate: Optional[float] = None, resource_group_id: str = '', comments: str = ''

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested Override $/Hr and Smart Import features. Override works correctly after backend fix. Smart Import button appears when project is editable (draft) and hidden when read-only (approved). Full Smart Import parsing test would require uploading an actual Excel file exported from EstiPro. Project PRJ-0008 (33b94115-c9d3-4aac-93bf-5b27cca0c13f) used for testing draft mode, PRJ-0011 (349294f1-0b8f-46d4-9b7a-fcb3ebc75dfe) used for testing read-only mode.
notes: Smart Import preview dialog (confirm-import-btn) and auto-creation of missing skills/locations could not be fully tested without uploading an actual EstiPro-exported Excel file.
